title: Tezraftaar® 50 x 3 Section Plastic Plates 10" (26cm) Reusable Compartment Plate for Dinner Lunch Breakfast in Wedding Parties Picnic Camping Catering Supply

Ideal :- This plastic 3 section plates is used in various type of occasions like christmas party, birthday party, BBQ party, get together party, you can use this plastic compartment plates in buffet, wedding and baby shower.
